idea-plugin.name: Pacvue Commerce Deploy
idea-plugin.description:
Pacvue Commerce Deploy is a JetBrains IDE tool window for triggering Pacvue Commerce test-environment deployments from GitHub Actions.

Open a Pacvue Commerce repository in IntelliJ IDEA or WebStorm, select the target branch and workflow, fill in the workflow inputs, confirm the deploy, and then track the GitHub Actions run directly inside the IDE.

  • Loads local Git branches and workflow_dispatch workflows from the current project.
  • Builds the deploy form from workflow inputs and validates required, choice, and boolean values before running.
  • Keeps project-scoped Recent Deploys with Reuse, Open Run, Cancel, and Clear actions.
  • Tracks each deployment run independently and shows success notifications in the IDE.
  • Creates an auto-triage GitHub Issue when dispatch or workflow execution fails.

Requirements: Node.js 16+, Git, and GitHub CLI authentication are recommended for dispatching, polling, opening, and cancelling workflow runs.
